qa_pairs.question: How can users monitor their active jobs within Open OnDemand and view detailed information about them?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can monitor active jobs by navigating to the 'Jobs' tab and selecting 'Active Jobs'. Columns can be sorted by clicking on their headers (e.g., job status). More details about a job, such as its start/end time, node list, and account charged, can be seen by clicking the `>` icon to the left of the job.

qa_pairs.question: How can users display all jobs in the queue within the Open OnDemand job monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: To display all jobs in the queue, users should click on the drop-down menu at the top right of the active jobs interface and select 'All Jobs'.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find a more comprehensive view of their jobs, beyond the Open OnDemand monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: A more detailed view of jobs can be accessed through the my.SciNet portal, available at https://my.scinet.utoronto.ca.
